title: Open the Eggless Desserts screen
test_steps: Open the mobile app. | Navigate to the Eggless Desserts screen.
expected_result: The Eggless Desserts screen is displayed with a list of four dessert recipes.

title: Navigate to the fifth dessert recipe
test_steps: Open the mobile app. | Navigate to the Eggless Desserts screen. | Scroll down to view the fifth dessert recipe.
expected_result: The fifth dessert recipe is partially visible at the bottom of the screen.

title: Click on a dessert recipe
test_steps: Open the mobile app. | Navigate to the Eggless Desserts screen. | Click on one of the dessert recipes.
expected_result: The detailed view of the selected dessert recipe is displayed.

title: Like a dessert recipe
test_steps: Open the mobile app. | Navigate to the Eggless Desserts screen. | Click on the heart icon next to a dessert recipe.
expected_result: The like count for the selected dessert recipe increases.

title: Share a dessert recipe
test_steps: Open the mobile app. | Navigate to the Eggless Desserts screen. | Click on the phone icon next to a dessert recipe.
expected_result: The sharing options for the selected dessert recipe are displayed.

title: Navigate back to the previous screen
test_steps: Open the mobile app. | Navigate to the Eggless Desserts screen. | Click on the back arrow in the header.
expected_result: The user is navigated back to the previous screen.

title: Check accessibility of the screen
test_steps: Open the mobile app. | Navigate to the Eggless Desserts screen. | Use accessibility tools to verify that all elements are accessible.
expected_result: All elements on the screen are accessible.

title: Check usability of the screen
test_steps: Open the mobile app. | Navigate to the Eggless Desserts screen. | Verify that the screen is easy to navigate and understand.
expected_result: The screen is easy to navigate and understand.
